brief: Iran-US tensions drive oil above $90, while Australia grapples with political debates and a YouTuber's court appearance. Research highlights include AI feedback in education and visualization tools.
news_summary: Oil prices crossed $90 as Iran vowed to block Hormuz; Australian news features Barnaby Joyce on deportations, Dreyfus on antisemitism, and Yung Filly's rape plea. Also: World Cup final, Guyanese ferry sinking, and China's literary prize for a delivery rider.
papers_summary: Papers examine AI feedback evaluation, visualization literacy in VLMs, debris tracking, and ChatGPT's effect on rhetorical moves in writing.

en.brief: Iran-US tensions drive oil above $90, while Australia grapples with political debates and a YouTuber's court appearance. Research highlights include AI feedback in education and visualization tools.
en.news_summary: Oil prices crossed $90 as Iran vowed to block Hormuz; Australian news features Barnaby Joyce on deportations, Dreyfus on antisemitism, and Yung Filly's rape plea. Also: World Cup final, Guyanese ferry sinking, and China's literary prize for a delivery rider.
en.papers_summary: Papers examine AI feedback evaluation, visualization literacy in VLMs, debris tracking, and ChatGPT's effect on rhetorical moves in writing.

zh.brief: 今日新聞亮點：外賣騎手王計兵獲中國頂級文學獎，凸顯藍領文學崛起；韓國流行音樂突破封鎖傳入朝鮮，動搖金正恩偶像地位；西班牙在混亂的世界盃決賽中擊敗阿根廷奪冠。研究方面，多項關於寫作過程與AI反饋的論文值得關注。
zh.news_summary: 外賣騎手獲中國頂級文學獎，K-pop滲透朝鮮，西班牙世界盃奪冠，俄羅斯人轉用現金，矮小雙胞胎提供癌症線索，揭陽虐狗案引發全球關注。
zh.papers_summary: 英文論文探討AI反饋對學生寫作的影響、視覺語言模型的可視化理解，以及暴寫過程中的停頓分析等。

todays_image.caption: Like the branching fronds of Lobophora sp., Derryn Hinch's journalism unravels hidden networks, while the alleged Islamic State affiliate's bail invites scrutiny of unseen connections.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
